title: The Prisoner's Dilemma Payoff Matrix
description: A visual representation of the strategic choices and payoffs for two players in the classic prisoner's dilemma, where individual rationality leads to a worse collective outcome.
relationships: Player A's choice (Cooperate/Defect) determines the row
Player B's choice (Cooperate/Defect) determines the column
The intersection of their choices shows the payoff outcome for both players, e.g., (A's sentence, B's sentence)
